zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de BRETAGNE於1287年出生在法國布列塔尼時，他的父親Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne26歲，母親Marie De Bourgogne27歲。他於1318年與Jeanne d'Avaugour結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1331年3月16日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年44歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼吉加普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy de BRETAGNE于1287年出生在法国布列塔尼时，他的父亲Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne26岁，母亲Marie De Bourgogne27岁。他于1318年与Jeanne d'Avaugour结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1331年3月16日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年44岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼吉加普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de BRETAGNE was born in 1287, in Brittany, France, his father, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, was 26 and his mother, Marie De Bourgogne, was 27. He married Jeanne d'Avaugour in 1318. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 16 March 1331, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 44, and was buried in Guingamp, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de BRETAGNE est né en 1287, à Bretagne, France, son père, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Marie De Bourgogne, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne d'Avaugour en 1318. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1331, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Guingamp, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de BRETAGNE 1287 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne 26 und seine Mutter Marie De Bourgogne 27. Er hat 1318 Jeanne d'Avaugour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. März 1331 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Guingamp, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de BRETAGNE è nato il nel 1287 nel Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Marie De Bourgogne, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne d'Avaugour nel 1318. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 16 marzo 1331, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de BRETAGNEが1287年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagneは26歳，母Marie De Bourgogneは27歳であった。1318年にJeanne d'Avaugourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1331年3月16日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで44歳で死去し，フランスブレタグングインガンップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de BRETAGNE(이)가 1287년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie De Bourgogne(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1318년 Jeanne d'Avaugour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1331년 3월 16일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 길그가프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de BRETAGNE nasceu em 1287, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Marie De Bourgogne, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne d'Avaugour em 1318. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de março de 1331, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Guingamp, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de BRETAGNE родился в 1287 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie De Bourgogne, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne d'Avaugour в 1318 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 16 марта 1331 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности гуингамп, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy de BRETAGNE nació en 1287, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Marie De Bourgogne, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Jeanne d'Avaugour en 1318. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1331, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia.
